title: pavonia geminiflora
intro: Pavonia geminiflora, also known as twinflower hibiscus, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mallow family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pavonia geminiflora include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate various digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
